headline: Is Synopsys, Inc. (SNPS) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is SNPS a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Synopsys, Inc. on Rijnberk InvestInsights’s Substack by Daan | InvestInsights. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on SNPS. Synopsys, Inc.’s share was trading at $424.32 as of March 3rd. SNPS’s trailing and forward P/E were 65.18 and 29.41, respectively according to Yahoo […]
